{{CargoRelic
|name=Barina's Helmet
|class_id=20054
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Barina's Helmet is a crystallization of the wisdom of Formula One car designers. The helmet has built-in vents and an integrated water cooling system, which can circulate water from the cooling jacket to maintain a perfect temperature of 52 degrees Celsius, reducing heat stress and allowing drivers to focus more on the race!
|fame=30
|art=18
|fth=13
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 5 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +5<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 60/60
|ss2=Per 5 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +10<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 60/60
|ss3=Per 5 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +15<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 60/60
|ss4=Per 5 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +15<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 60/60
|ss7=Per 5 Rift Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +15<br>Rift Apostles Dominated: 60/60<br> (Awakened)
}}
